Add ATLAS to Home Screen
Install as an app — works like native, loads instantly
A
Install ATLAS on your iPhone
1. Tap the Share button ⬆ at the bottom of Safari
2. Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
3. Tap Add — ATLAS will appear as an app icon

📊
TradingView Chart
ATLAS LEVELS FOR THIS CHART
Load a chart to see ATLAS key levels
📓 PAPER TRADES — THIS PAIR
No trades logged for this pair
⚡ TIER 1 — HIGHEST EDGE ▾
💱 CURRENCY STRENGTH METER
8-currency live ranking · strongest vs weakest
LIVE ▾
Real-time strength ranking for USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, AUD, CAD, NZD. Trade the strongest vs the weakest for highest-probability setups. Updates when Markets prices refresh.
RETAIL SENTIMENT + COT
Smart vs dumb money · batch multi-pair
TIER 1 ▾
Analyses COT + retail sentiment across all selected pairs at once, then synthesises a unified trade recommendation from the combined signals.
SELECT PAIRS (multi-select)
Runs all pairs in one pass · gives unified trade recommendation
LIQUIDITY HEATMAP
Where institutions will hunt stops
TIER 1 ▾
Plots equal highs/lows, PDH/PDL, round numbers, and session extremes as liquidity zones.
FVG AUTO-DETECTION
Fair Value Gaps — live price watch
TIER 1 ▾
Detects bullish and bearish FVGs from live candle data. Alerts when price is currently inside an active FVG.
LIQUIDITY SWEEP ALERT
SMC entry trigger — sweep confirmation
TIER 1 ▾
Detects whether price has swept equal highs/lows or PDH/PDL — the SMC entry trigger. This is the moment to enter.
VOLUME PROFILE — VPOC / POC
Institutional price magnet levels
TIER 1 ▾
Point of Control — the price level with the most traded volume. Price regularly returns to VPOC.
SESSION HIGH/LOW TRACKER
Asian range · PDH/PDL · Weekly open
TIER 2 ▾
Tracks Asian session range, previous day high/low, and weekly open — the most reliable institutional reference points.
AI ENTRY MICRO-TRIGGER
5M/15M precision — now vs not yet
TIER 2 ▾
The 5M/15M trigger layer — watches for engulfing candles, pin bars at key levels, RSI divergence after a higher-TF signal is confirmed.
🤖 AI TOOLS ▸
MT4/MT5 EA GENERATOR
Generate ready-to-paste MQL code
▾
AI COACHING REPORT
Patterns from your trade history
5+ TRADES
Analyses your paper trade journal and surfaces win patterns, bad habits, and personalized coaching.
POSITION SIZEREXACT LOT SIZE
PIP VALUE CALCULATOR
Enter pair above
SPREAD COST CALCULATORREAL R:R
A 1:2 trade with a 30-pip spread on Gold actually closes at 1:1.3. See your real R:R after the spread eats into your stop and target.
MONTE CARLO RISK OF RUINACCOUNT PROTECTION
A 70% win-rate system can still blow up with wrong sizing. Simulate 10,000 trading runs to find your true survival probability and optimal bet size.
Or load stats from your paper trade journal →
AI CONFIDENCE CALIBRATIONACCURACY TRACKER
Tracks whether ATLAS confidence scores actually match your real win rate. Corrects for systematic overconfidence.
PERSONAL TRADING DNAYOUR EDGE PROFILE
Built from your paper trade history. Reveals preferred style, best session, worst patterns (revenge trading, overtrading).
STRATEGY BACKTESTERLAST 3 MONTHS
Tests your strategy rules against real historical candles. Answers: "Would this have worked over the last 3 months?" Separates genuine edge from luck.
DIVERGENCE SCANNER30+ INSTRUMENTS
Scans all 30+ instrument pairs simultaneously for RSI divergence — surfaces catch-up trade setups you'd miss manually. Run once per session.
NEWS IMPACT DATABASETRADE OR WAIT?
Before every high-impact event, see how that specific pair historically reacted. Tells you whether to trade the event or wait for the dust to settle.
ADVANCED JOURNAL ANALYTICSPATTERN MINING
Auto-surfaces patterns from your paper trade journal: win rate by instrument, session, time-of-day, setup type. Tells you what to stop doing.
CENTRAL BANK SENTIMENT TRACKERMACRO MACRO MACRO
Running tracker of Fed/ECB/BOE language shifts (hawkish → dovish). The macro trend in rates is the strongest driver of FX over weeks and months.
◆ WEEKEND WAR ROOM SUNDAY PREP · NEXT WEEK PLAN
WEEKLY CLOSE AUTOPSY + NEXT WEEK PLAN AI-POWERED
Reads last week's candles across all major pairs — highs, lows, close, candle type, key levels — then combines with the upcoming economic calendar, fundamental backdrop, and news sentiment to give you a complete trading plan for the week ahead.

⚡
Welcome to ATLAS
Institutional-grade market intelligence for retail traders. GO or NO-GO signals in seconds — Gold, Forex, Oil, Crypto.
🔑
Connect Your AI Engine
Get a free Anthropic API key at console.anthropic.com → API Keys → Create Key. Paste it into the setup bar on the home screen.
🎯
Your GO/NO-GO Signal
Type any instrument (XAUUSD, EURUSD, GBPJPY…) and tap ANALYSE. Get entry, stop, targets and lot size ready to paste into MT5.
📋
Paper Trade First
Use the PAPER tab to log trades risk-free. ATLAS tracks your win rate, P&L, and builds your trading DNA — showing exactly what works for you.
⚙ SETTINGS
🔑 API KEYS ▼
Daily API budget (800 free calls/day) -- / 800
Keys stored locally on this device only — never sent anywhere except the respective APIs.
🔔 NOTIFICATIONS & TELEGRAM ▼
When set to a score, ATLAS sends to Telegram whenever confluence meets the threshold regardless of GO/CAUTION.
Push self-audits to Telegram
After each trade closes, send the AI lesson to your TG channel
Calendar auto-scan alerts
Banner + auto-scan when high-impact event is within 30 min
🧠 AI MODEL & ANALYSIS ▼
AI MODEL TIERS
⚡ Haiku 4.5FAST · $1/MTok
Session reviews, news scoring, calendar, watchlist checks, single-pair sentiment
🧠 Sonnet 4.6BALANCED · $3/MTok
Main GO/NO-GO analysis, scanner ranking, multi-pair COT sentiment
🔮 Opus 4.6DEEP · $5/MTok
War Room briefings, weekly debrief, full pattern learning
✓ Prompt caching active — system prompts cached, saving ~70% on repeated calls
📷 Chart vision active — live chart image sent with every Sonnet/Opus analysis call
💼 ACCOUNT & PREFERENCES ▼
PREFERENCES
🎯 Accuracy Mode
ON = all 29 tools, 45s timeout, 4000 tokens
OFF = faster (10s) but may skip tools
Deep Analysis default
Account size (USD)
Default risk %
Morning brief (UTC)
Auto-push to Telegram daily
CENTRAL BANK RATES
Rates are updated each session. Current values reflect May 2026 decisions.
🔒 APP SECURITYOFF
DATA & PRIVACY
All data (trades, watchlist, settings) is stored locally on this device in localStorage. Nothing is sent to external servers except API calls you initiate.
